zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Roger Venables IV於大約1211年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Hugh de Venables21歲，母親Alice de Oxton16歲。他和Alicea Pennington至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1260年9月29日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Roger Venables IV于大约1211年出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Venables21岁，母亲Alice de Oxton16岁。他和Alicea Pennington至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1260年9月29日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Roger Venables IV was born about 1211, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Venables, was 21 and his mother, Alice de Oxton, was 16. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Alicea Pennington. He died on 29 September 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Roger Venables IV est né environ 1211, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de Oxton, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Alicea Pennington. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Roger Venables IV um 1211 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Venables 21 und seine Mutter Alice de Oxton 16. Er hatte mit Alicea Pennington mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1260 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Roger Venables IV è nato il circa 1211 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Oxton, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Alicea Pennington. Morì il 29 settembre 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Roger Venables IVが約1211年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは21歳，母Alice de Oxtonは16歳であった。彼はAlicea Penningtonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1260年9月29日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Roger Venables IV(이)가 대략 1211년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Oxton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Alicea Pennington(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Roger Venables IV nasceu aproximadamente 1211, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Oxton, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Alicea Pennington. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1260, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Roger Venables IV родился около 1211 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Oxton, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Alicea Pennington. Он умер 29 сентября 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Roger Venables IV nació aproximadamente 1211, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice de Oxton, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Alicea Pennington. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1260, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
